response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer with over 15 years in the industry, meeting the minimum tenure. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and his long-running entrepreneurial open-source project are significant strengths. However, his resume reads more as a strong hands-on Staff Engineer rather than a Director-level strategic leader. There is limited evidence of defining high-level AI strategy, advising major customers, or driving product vision across a large organization, which are core responsibilities of this Principal role.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
Recent, relevant experience building AI-agent infrastructure and tooling.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial spirit and leadership through founding and maintaining the GISCollective open-source project.
concerns: Lacks demonstrated experience operating at a Director-level, focusing on high-level strategy and organizational influence.
No explicit experience advising strategic customers or partners on technology adoption.
The depth of AI/ML expertise appears recent and may not meet the 'recognized expertise' preferred for this senior strategic role.
